identity.name: Light Engine
identity.description: Cloud-based indoor vertical farming infrastructure running on AWS Elastic Beanstalk. The Light Engine IS the farm -- there is no physical edge hardware. All sensor data, device control, and farm operations run from AWS.

environments.name: Light Engine (LE)
environments.role: Sensor data, device APIs, environment control, farm dashboard, EVIE frontend

environments.name: GreenReach Central
environments.role: AI assistants (EVIE + FAYE APIs), admin dashboard, PostgreSQL, wholesale, payments

infrastructure.database: PostgreSQL on RDS (farms, plantings, inventory, orders, sensor_data, alerts)

sensor_pipeline.source: SwitchBot Hub 2 sensors (temperature + humidity per zone)
sensor_pipeline.flow: SwitchBot Cloud API -> LE polling (every 5 min) -> PostgreSQL sensor_data table -> EVIE environment readings
troubleshooting: If sensors show stale data: check SwitchBot credentials (SWITCHBOT_TOKEN, SWITCHBOT_SECRET) on LE environment
If credentials are missing, sensors silently stop updating with no error
Sensor data is zone-specific: each zone has its own sensor device mapped via device_registry

device_management.registration: Devices are registered via scan_devices (auto-discover) or register_device (manual). Each device is assigned to a room + zone.
device_management.zones: Zones are logical grow areas within rooms. Each zone has environment targets (temp, humidity, VPD) and can have sensors, lights, and actuators.

environment_control.targets: Each zone has configurable target ranges for temperature (C), humidity (%), and VPD (kPa)
environment_control.monitoring: Real-time sensor readings compared to targets. Drift detection generates alerts via daily todo.
environment_control.light_schedules: Per-zone photoperiod (on/off times) + PPFD targets. Tied to crop growth recipes.

key_facts: The farm is 100% cloud-hosted. There is no Raspberry Pi, no physical edge server.
EVIE is the grower-facing AI. FAYE is the admin/business AI. FAYE supervises EVIE.
All API routes are proxied: EVIE frontend on LE calls Central APIs via server-foxtrot.js proxy middleware.
Crop growth recipes (89 total) define day-by-day environment targets per growth stage.
Wholesale orders use Square for payments with a 12% broker commission (app_fee_money).
POS (Point of Sale) for direct farm sales operates at /farm-sales-pos.html.
